page.content: The analysis presents the unadjusted coefficient for adiposity at age 11 (95 % CI), adjusted coefficient for adiposity at age 11 (95 % CI), unadjusted coefficient for change in adiposity between 7 and 11 (95 % CI), and adjusted coefficient for change in adiposity between 7 and 11 (95 % CI) across different categories of the sample. In the category "Neither" (16.4 %), the values are ref, ref, ref, ref. For "ASB but not SSB" (22.8 %), the coefficients are 0.91 (0.70; 1.12), 0.72 (0.50; 0.95), 0.20 (0.06; 0.34), and 0.13 (−0.01; 0.26).

page.content: The "SSB but not ASB" category (20.0 %) shows coefficients of 0.24 (0.02; 0.46), 0.17 (−0.05; 0.39), 0.28 (0.13; 0.42), and 0.20 (0.06; 0.34). In the "Both" category (40.8 %), the coefficients are 0.86 (0.69; 1.04), 0.65 (0.45; 0.86), 0.44 (0.31; 0.56), and 0.33 (0.19; 0.47). The second category, also labeled "Category (% of sample)," includes "Neither" (16.8 %) with values of ref, ref, ref, ref; "ASB but not SSB" (23.5 %) showing coefficients of 1.60 (1.10; 2.11), 1.39 (0.86; 1.92), 0.25 (−0.10; 0.61), and 0.22 (−0.13; 0.60); "SSB but not ASB" (19.0 %) with coefficients of 0.57 (0.07; 1.08), 0.54 (0.05; 1.05), 0.46 (0.10; 0.82), and 0.47 (0.10; 0.84); and "Both" (40.7 %) displaying coefficients of 1.78 (1.38; 2.19), 1.49 (1.05; 1.94), 0.82 (0.51; 1.12), and 0.73 (0.41; 1.05).
